title: 试点到规模化的鸿沟，不是技术问题
core_message: 缺的不是更强的模型，是知识不流动、经验不沉淀、流程不循环。真正的差距不在AI能力，在组织能力。

content.title: 试点到规模化的鸿沟，不是技术问题

content: 知识不流动：做完就归档，下次从头来
经验不沉淀：人在经验在，人走经验走
流程不循环：每次执行都是消耗，不是积累

illustration_prompt: A dramatic abstract illustration of a wide chasm splitting the composition horizontally, scattered small islands on the left labeled with tiny icons representing isolated pilots, a unified landmass on the right, a golden bridge being constructed across the gap with luminous segments, deep navy background, ethereal blue glow in the chasm, executive consulting style, 16:9, 4K
